title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 10 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 10/01/2023
Image reference: 2023-01-10_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-10-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable
Capesize (Newcastlemax) Cape Maple (206,200 DWT, Aug 2005, Imabari) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 15.50 mil, VV Value USD 16.01 mil. Capesize Aquasalwador (180,000 DWT, Jan 2012, Daehan) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 27.00 mil, VV Value USD 25.26 mil - BWTS fitted. Handy BC Baltic Pearl (37,200 DWT, Jan 2014, Zhejiang Ouhua) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 19.00 mil, VV Value USD 16.09 mil - BWTS fitted
Handy BC Atlantic Dream (32,500 DWT, Dec 2011, Zhejiang Hongxin) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 10.75 mil, VV Value USD 10.95 mil - BWTS fitted.
